items.title: Heat summer schedule includes sizzle of opener vs. Bucks in Las Vegas. www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/06/26/h... Also: Schedules for both Heat summer leagues, players expected to participate, and a Jahmir Young update.
items.author: Ira Winderman
items.body_excerpt: Heat summer schedule includes sizzle of opener vs. Bucks in Las Vegas. www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/06/26/h... Also: Schedules for both Heat summer leagues, players expected to participate, and a Jahmir Young update.

media.title: Heat summer schedule includes sizzle of opener vs. Bucks in Las Vegas
media.description: While it comes in the context of offseason basketball, the NBA apparently couldn’t resist a bit of theater with the scheduling of the Las Vegas NBA Summer League.

items.title: Miami to decline $2.4 million team option on Jahmir Young
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt: Miami to decline $2.4 million team option on Jahmir Young HoopsHype

items.title: The Miami Heat will decline the $2.41 million team option on Jahmir Young, sources told HoppsHype. Young made All-NBA G League Second Team, averaging 25.9 points, 8.5 assists, 4.9 rebounds, and 1.8 steals last season. He’s played 20 NBA games for the Bulls and Heat in two years.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Miami Heat will decline the $2.41 million team option on Jahmir Young, sources told HoppsHype. Young made All-NBA G League Second Team, averaging 25.9 points, 8.5 assists, 4.9 rebounds, and 1.8 steals last season. He’s played 20 NBA games for the Bulls and Heat in two years.
